coin_profile.name: Brett
coin_profile.bucket_explanation: A Cash-Flow Protocol is a blockchain or app that earns real money from its users — just like a business. Every time someone makes a trade, borrows money, or uses the network, it collects a small fee. The more people use it, the more fees it earns. We value these tokens similarly to how you would value a business — by looking at how much it earns versus what investors are paying for it.
coin_profile.description: Brett (BRETT) — a Cash-Flow Protocol ranked #398 by market cap.

BRETT.name: Brett

dilution_control.label: Dilution Control

moat.rationale: BRETT exhibits minimal protocol moat characteristics typical of meme coins with no meaningful cash-flow generation, utility capture, or ecosystem lock-in despite excellent network demand and dilution control signals. The protocol lacks competitive defensibility (easily forked), has no demonstrated network effects or switching costs, and token holders receive no real economic value—making it fundamentally vulnerable to replication and sentiment-driven volatility regardless of its current market position.
